headline: It’s the last day of Prime Day — here are over 140 great deals to choose from
summary: Today marks the final day of Prime Day sales. Find discounts on over 140 gadgets like TVs, smart home tech, and headphones. Popular deals are selling out fast, so act quickly.

headline: OpenAI unveils GPT-5.6 amid US AI regulatory drama
summary: OpenAI released GPT-5.6, including models Sol, Terra, and Luna. The release follows a request from the Trump administration to stagger AI model unveils. Sol is the flagship, Terra for high-volume, and Luna is a lower-tier model.

headline: Smart lock maker Level has been gutted and its founders are out
summary: Smart lock company Level Home has undergone major layoffs. The business is being folded into Kwikset by parent company Assa Abloy. Level's founders are no longer with the company.

headline: You won’t have long to get these iPad deals before Apple’s price hike
summary: Apple has raised prices across its iPad and MacBook lines. Retailers still offer iPads at old, lower prices for a limited time. This is potentially the last chance for significant iPad deals.

headline: Save Big on LEGO Sets - Including Lord of the Rings Before Prime Day Ends Tonight
summary: Score major discounts on LEGO sets right now. Lord of the Rings sets like Barad-dûr and Rivendell are included. These deals expire tonight with Prime Day's end.

headline: PS5 Exclusive Ghost of Yotei Triggers Tourism Push in Hokkaido, Japan, With Plans for Curated Tours of Locations Featured in the Game
summary: The PS5 exclusive "Ghost of Yotei" is boosting tourism in Hokkaido, Japan. Local towns near Mount Yotei plan curated tours of in-game locations. Official merch collaborations are also in the works to attract visitors.

headline: The Supergirl 4K Limited Edition Steelbook Is Already Up For Preorder At Amazon
summary: The Supergirl 4K Limited Edition Steelbook is now available for preorder. It can be preordered directly from Amazon. Secure your copy of the exclusive edition today.

headline: Squid Game X Codes (June 2026)
summary: New Squid Game X codes for June 2026 are available. Redeem these codes for free in-game money. Use the money to purchase new outfits and items.

headline: Court rules 13 men who allegedly helped rapist drug and abuse wife can be named
summary: A court has ruled that 13 men accused of assisting a rapist can be named. The men allegedly helped a man drug and abuse his wife for years. This decision allows for greater public transparency in the case.

headline: Mother dies saving daughter in Venezuela earthquakes
summary: A mother tragically died saving her daughter during Venezuela's recent earthquakes. Héctor Bello stated she sacrificed her life for their child. The quakes killed at least 589 people in total.

headline: Man who punched female police officers at Manchester Airport jailed
summary: Mohammed Fahir Amaaz was jailed for assaulting police officers. He punched PC Lydia Ward and PC Ellie Cook at Manchester Airport. A Starbucks customer was also assaulted by Amaaz.

headline: How transparent are the royals being about money?
summary: Questions persist about the Royal Family's financial transparency. This comes after the King revealed his tax payments. The public seeks more openness regarding their wealth.
